features.title: Features
features.subtitle: A single workspace for distribution, retail services, and field operations—scoped by company, gated by role, and ready for real money flows.
features.intro: {platform} is designed as a multi-tenant system: each workspace is a company with its own data. Users belong to one company per session; permissions determine which modules appear and which row actions are available.
features.footnote: Exact screens depend on your role (owner, admin, manager, sales, inventory, accountant, support, viewer). Owners and admins typically see the full surface area; other roles inherit curated permissions.

modules.title: Overview & analytics
modules.desc: Company-scoped dashboard with sales, AR, expenses, and stock signals.

modules.title: Customers & CRM
modules.desc: Accounts, contacts, and history with permission-aware access.

modules.title: Suppliers
modules.desc: Vendor records tied to purchase orders and receiving.

modules.title: Products & services
modules.desc: Catalog, SKUs, pricing, and optional services alongside physical goods.

modules.title: Inventory
modules.desc: Stock movements, levels, and low-stock awareness.

modules.title: Quotations
modules.desc: Create, send, and convert quotes into invoices without re-keying lines.

modules.title: Invoices
modules.desc: Draft, send, and track invoices with email flows where configured.

modules.title: Payments
modules.desc: Record payments against invoices; supports Paystack flows for customer pay.

modules.title: Sales
modules.desc: Direct sales with optional inventory deduction for product lines.

modules.title: Purchase orders
modules.desc: Approve and receive stock against suppliers with audit-friendly trails.

modules.title: Expenses
modules.desc: Submit, approve, and track operational spend with categories.

modules.title: Notifications
modules.desc: In-app alerts for operational events your role is allowed to see.

modules.title: Team
modules.desc: Invite staff, assign roles, change status, and remove access safely.

modules.title: Billing & subscriptions
modules.desc: Workspace subscription to the platform (Paystack checkout where enabled).

modules.title: Company profile
modules.desc: Legal identity, branding, and workspace-level settings.

modules.title: Tenant Paystack
modules.desc: Connect your merchant keys for customer invoice payments and webhooks.

modules.title: System preferences
modules.desc: Administrative options for operators with company-settings permission.

modules.title: Audit log
modules.desc: Immutable-style trail of sensitive actions for compliance reviews.

modules.title: Uploads
modules.desc: Files to Backblaze B2—logos, avatars, receipts, and product images.

modules.title: Profile & preferences
modules.desc: Personal details, timezone, and notification preferences per user.

modules.title: Services catalog
modules.desc: Non-stock billable lines such as delivery or installation fees.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From first signup to running invoices and inventory—designed for operators who need predictable workflows, not toy demos.
howItWorks.qaLink: View the full QA script on GitHub

steps.title: Create your workspace
steps.body: Register with your company name. You become the owner of a new tenant—data is isolated from every other business on the platform.

steps.title: Secure session
steps.body: Authentication uses httpOnly cookies and short-lived access tokens. Your browser never stores long-lived secrets in localStorage for core API calls.

steps.title: Invite the team
steps.body: Send email invites from Team. Each member gets a role (admin, manager, sales, inventory, accountant, support, viewer) with default permissions you can refine over time.

steps.title: Configure money rails
steps.body: For platform billing, complete subscription checkout where enabled. For customer invoice payments, add your Paystack public/secret keys under Company → Payments; configure callback and webhook URLs in Paystack. Production stacks should set ENCRYPTION_KEY (64 hex chars) for tenant secrets. All of this runs inside {platform}.

steps.title: Operate daily
steps.body: Load customers, suppliers, and products; run quotes to invoices; record payments and expenses; move stock with inventory movements; use purchase orders for inbound goods.

steps.title: Stay informed
steps.body: Notifications surface important events. Audit log captures sensitive actions for review. Uploads store files in your configured object storage (e.g. logos and receipts).

steps.title: Govern access
steps.body: Change roles, suspend accounts, or remove teammates from the Team screen. Owners cannot be removed without another owner—protecting the last keyholder.
